_inspectorSnowReport.Report: Wednesday February 25, 5:30 a.m. Today is going to be a wet Wednesday with storms expected to continue through tomorrow. We picked up 6 inches of new snow overnight up at Summit Express. We will see snowfall today as well as some winter mix. Precipitation is projected to have a high-water content and maintain steady showers into the evening that could bring a few more inches of snow. Temperatures will be in the mid 30s with moderate winds out of the west under cloudy skies. Grab your waterproof gear and low light lenses and join us for some soft skiing. Your days at Solitude — aka 'Solidaze' — are more valuable than ever before. The more you ski and ride at Solitude the more you win. We are giving away thousands of sweet prizes including a 26/27 Ikon Pass! Stay dry and have a fun day on the hill!
_inspectorSnowReport.AdditionalText: Today is going to be a wet Wednesday with storms expected to continue through tomorrow. We picked up 6 inches of new snow overnight. Take a lap on Powderhorn II to find some freshies. We will see snowfall today as well as some winter mix. Precipitation is projected to have a high-water content and maintain steady showers into the evening that could bring a few more inches of snow. Temperatures will be in the mid 30s with moderate winds out of the west under cloudy skies. Grab your waterproof gear and low light lenses and join us for some soft and slushy skiing. Your days at Solitude — aka 'Solidaze' — are more valuable than ever before. The more you ski and ride at Solitude the more you win. We are giving away thousands of sweet prizes including a 26/27 Ikon Pass! Stay dry and have a fun day on the hill!
_inspectorSnowReport.Alert: 6 inches of new snow since lifts closed
